caption: A person's hand holds a sports trading card encased in a clear protective sleeve. The card features an athlete, with the name "ALOMAR" printed at the bottom and a signature across the image. The card's design includes gold-toned borders and diagonal stripes. In the background, a man wearing a navy blue t-shirt sits at a desk in a room with a palm tree motif on the surface. Various pieces of equipment and other cards are visible on the desk. The screen displays the logos "JASPYS" and "CASEBREAKS.COM" in the upper right area. As the sequence progresses, the person tilts the card to show different angles of the holographic effect and the protective casing. The man in the background remains seated, looking toward the camera as the card is showcased.
